title: plantago monosperma subsp. discolor
intro: Plantago monosperma subsp. discolor, also known as Mexican plantain, is a perennial herb that belongs to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Plantago monosperma subsp. discolor include treating various conditions such as wounds, burns, and skin infections, as well as reducing inflammation and improving digestive health. Herbal preparations of Plantago monosperma subsp. discolor include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
